reference: I had an abscessed tooth that was very infected and pulled on Tuesday. I have been having diarrhea that is very yellow and watery every time I eat, even the lightest foods. I am on Amoxicillin five hundred milligrams; it has been five days. I am feeling very weak. Is this from the bacteria coming out of my system? Should I let it come out, or should I take something to try to stop the diarrhea? I find that Imodium does not help. Do you have any suggestions for something I should take? Thank you.
text: I had an abscessed tooth that was very infected and pulled on Tuesday. I have been having diarrhea that is very yellow and watery every time I eat, even the lightest food. I am on amoxicillin 500mg. It has been 5 days. I am feeling very weak. Some of the bacteria coming out of my system? Should I let it come out or should I take something to try to stop the diarrhea? I find that Imodium does not help. Do you have any suggestions for something I should take? Thank you.
